label: The Cinder Cantina
description: The Cinder Cantina occupies a slagcrete vault cut into Ashenward City’s basaltic windbreak mass, its low ceiling ribbed with reinforcement and soot-blackened conduit. Vitrified paving gives way to cracked stone flags dusted with perpetual ash, while narrow light-strips cast bruised violet reflections that echo the city’s auroral glare. A long, scarred counter of riveted plasteel divides the room from a wall of caged burners and insulated taps designed to function amid constant atmospheric interference. Shielded vox-baffles and heavy intake grilles lend the interior a sealed, pressurized character, muting the ash-gales outside into a distant, metallic hush.
